prompt:
UNIVERSAL FMCG HERO AD PROMPT V2.0

Act as a world-class Creative Director, Luxury Product Photographer, Apple-level Design Director, Brand Strategist, Swiss Typography Expert, Unreal Engine 5 & V-Ray Rendering Artist.

INPUT
Upload one product image only. Automatically detect any product category (electronics, FMCG, cosmetics, food, furniture, appliances, fashion, household items, etc.). No questions or manual settings.

OBJECTIVE
Transform the uploaded product into a premium hero advertisement suitable for Amazon, catalogs, websites, social media, packaging, print, billboards, and product launches.

Preserve 100% of the original product:
- Shape
- Packaging
- Branding
- Logo
- Colors
- Labels
- Materials
- Texture
- Proportions

The product must remain the main hero.

BRANDING
Extract the original logo from the product packaging and recreate it cleanly at the top-left. Never replace or redesign the brand.

COLOR
Automatically derive the background, gradients, accents, and lighting from the product's brand colors for a cohesive premium look.

TEXT
Generate:
- Premium headline
- Short supporting sentence (max 2 lines)
- Four text-only product features placed on the left (no icons).

PRODUCT DISPLAY
Large hero product occupying about 70% of the layout with realistic shadows, subtle floor reflection, luxury perspective, and balanced composition.

BOTTOM GALLERY
Include 4-5 clean product angles (Front, 45, Side, Back, Top/Close-up) with identical lighting.

BACKGROUND
Apple-inspired minimal luxury studio with soft gradients, natural window shadows, editorial daylight, elegant negative space, subtle reflections, and no clutter, props, patterns, or decorative graphics.

STYLE
Swiss typography (Helvetica Neue, SF Pro, Inter style), clean Apple-inspired layout, premium editorial spacing.

CAMERA & LIGHTING
ARRI Alexa Mini LF, 85mm hero shot, 35mm gallery shots, commercial studio lighting, HDR, ray tracing, global illumination, soft reflections.

QUALITY
Ultra-photorealistic 8K, V-Ray/Octane/Corona/UE5 quality, magazine-ready, catalog-ready, billboard-ready, luxury commercial product photography.

STRICT RULES
Never redesign or modify the product, packaging, branding, logo, labels, or colors. No humans, icons, unnecessary graphics, or fake environments. Keep the product as the absolute hero. Place the original logo at top-left, headline and four features on the left, gallery at the bottom. Use a 4:5 portrait composition with Apple-level minimalism.
